thinks.think: A thin stream of dark chocolate pours onto a textured, square oat bar in the foreground, adding to the drizzle pattern. The chocolate coverage increases with zig-zag lines across the golden-brown surface. In the background, similar bars with existing chocolate toppings rest on a wooden board near a white bowl containing ingredients, remaining stationary.

A hand reaches into the frame from above, holding small, golden-brown crumbs. The fingers release these toppings onto the central oat bar, scattering them over the wet chocolate drizzle and textured surface. The white bowl and background bars remain stationary while the garnishing takes place.

A hand reaches down from above to grasp the central oat bar, fingers positioning on either side of the treat. The bar, covered in chocolate drizzle and crumbs, is held steady. Background elements, including the white bowl and other bars, remain unchanged on the wooden board.

Large, capitalized white text reading "BUTTERFINGER RICE KRISPIE TREATS" appears centered on the screen. In the background, hands grasp and lift a prepared bar, displaying the chocolate topping. The wooden board and white bowl remain visible but are partially obscured by the text overlay and depth of field.

The scene changes to a top-down view of a grey pot. Hands hold a small white bowl containing a creamy tan mixture over the pan while a spoon stirs it. White text 'BUTTER & PEANUT BUTTER' appears centrally. A bowl of brown crumbles is visible in the top left corner on a striped cloth.

The text overlay vanishes. Hands tilt the small white bowl, pouring the creamy tan mixture into the grey pot where a butter square sits. A metal spoon scrapes the remaining contents from the bowl into the pan, combining ingredients.

The camera zooms in to a close-up inside the pot, showing the butter and peanut butter melted into a smooth, light brown liquid. A wooden spoon stirs the mixture vigorously, blending the ingredients into a consistent, creamy texture.

Inside the pot, a wooden spoon stirs the fully melted mixture. The butter and peanut butter have blended into a smooth, glossy, tan liquid. The spoon creates circular ripples and swirls on the surface, indicating a creamy and uniform consistency as the stirring action continues to blend the ingredients.

White marshmallows are dropped into the pot containing the melted tan mixture. The text "MARSHMALLOWS" appears in white capital letters centered on screen. Several cylindrical white marshmallows float on the surface of the liquid as a hand adds more from above into the grey pot.

The white text overlay disappears. The top-down view shows the grey pot containing the tan liquid and numerous white marshmallows. A hand adds more marshmallows to the pot. Then, a wooden spoon stirs the mixture, agitating the white cylinders within the melted base.

A wooden spoon stirs the white marshmallows into the melted tan mixture inside the grey pot. The spoon pushes the cylindrical marshmallows around, agitating them within the liquid base. The marshmallows shift position and begin to get coated as the stirring continues to blend the ingredients together.

A wooden spoon vigorously stirs the white marshmallows into the melted tan mixture inside the grey pot. The marshmallows become increasingly coated and begin to melt, blending into the sticky base as the spoon agitates the ingredients together.

In a close-up shot, a wooden spoon stirs the melting marshmallows into the tan peanut butter mixture. The white marshmallows dissolve significantly, creating a thick, stringy, and cohesive sticky texture as the ingredients blend into a uniform, gooey beige mass within the pot.

A wooden spoon stirs the thick, beige mixture inside the metal pot, blending the melting marshmallows into the tan base. The substance becomes smoother and more cohesive, displaying a sticky, stringy texture as the white chunks dissolve. The stirring motion continues to incorporate the ingredients into a uniform, viscous mass.

A wooden spoon stirs the smooth, glossy beige mixture inside the silver metal pot. The spoon lifts slightly, revealing the thick, sticky consistency of the melted blend as it coats the wood. The mixture swirls around the bottom of the pan, appearing fully incorporated and viscous.

The wooden spoon rests in the thick, glossy beige mixture within the silver pot. A hand pours a large quantity of light yellow, puffy rice cereal from a glass container into the pot. White capital text reading "RICE KRISPIES" appears centered over the falling cereal as it lands on the sticky base.

The pouring action continues as light yellow rice cereal fills the silver pot, accumulating over the thick beige mixture and wooden spoon. The clear glass container empties its contents, leaving the pot nearly full of the dry, puffy grains. The cereal completely covers the sticky base, creating a textured layer ready for mixing.

A hand grips a wooden spoon to vigorously stir the mound of light yellow rice cereal into the thick, glossy beige mixture within the silver pot. The dry grains shift and begin coating with the sticky base as the spoon moves through the ingredients.

A hand vigorously stirs the light yellow rice cereal into the thick, glossy beige mixture using a wooden spoon. The dry grains shift and become increasingly coated with the sticky base as the spoon moves through the pot, blending the ingredients together into a cohesive mass.

A hand vigorously stirs the rice cereal and sticky beige mixture in the metal pot with a wooden spoon. The ingredients are thoroughly combined into a cohesive, clumpy mass with visible stringy strands connecting the cereal pieces. The texture appears uniform and gooey as the stirring motion lifts and folds the heavy mixture.

The view shifts to a wide shot of the silver pot, showing the wooden spoon resting in the fully combined rice cereal mixture. The cereal pieces are thoroughly coated in the sticky beige base, creating a dense, uniform texture throughout the pan. The gooey mass fills the bottom of the pot, appearing settled with the spoon handle extending towards the lower right.

A hand pours crushed light brown pieces into the silver pot over the sticky cereal mixture. The dry, crumbly fragments fall onto the cohesive brown base, adding a new texture layer. The stream of toppings lands on the combined ingredients, creating a pile of crunchy bits on the surface.

A wooden spoon stirs the crushed light brown candy pieces into the sticky rice cereal mixture inside the silver pot. The dry crumbs blend with the cohesive brown base, distributing the crunchy texture throughout the gooey mass as the spoon lifts and folds the ingredients together.

A wooden spoon vigorously stirs the mixture inside the silver pot, folding the crushed light brown candy pieces into the sticky, coated rice cereal. The ingredients blend into a cohesive, stringy mass as the spoon lifts and turns the gooey contents, ensuring the crunchy fragments are evenly distributed throughout the brown base.

A wooden spoon vigorously mixes the sticky, stringy mass inside the silver pot, folding the rice cereal and crushed candy pieces together. The ingredients form a cohesive, gooey brown texture as the spoon lifts and turns the contents, ensuring the crunchy fragments are evenly distributed throughout the mixture.

After the wooden spoon finishes mixing the sticky cereal and candy mixture in the silver pot, the scene cuts to a clear glass square baking dish. Two bare hands press down firmly on the transferred brown, textured mixture, flattening it into an even, compact layer within the container.

A square glass baking dish rests on a white surface, filled with the flattened brown mixture. Visible rice cereal grains and chunks create a textured surface. Hands hold the sides of the clear container, displaying the compacted treat.

The video cuts to a white surface with the text "LET COOL" centered. Next, a metal measuring cup pours dark brown chocolate chips into a white bowl, while the white text "CHOCOLATE CHIPS" appears overlaid on the falling ingredients.

Dark brown chocolate chips fill a white bowl after being poured from a metal measuring cup. A metal spoon holding a dollop of yellow butter moves into the frame, hovering directly over the pile of chips to add the ingredient.

A finger pushes a yellow dollop of butter off a metal spoon into a white bowl filled with dark chocolate chips. The butter lands on the pile of chips, and the spoon is withdrawn, leaving the butter resting centrally on the chocolate. The bowl sits on a white surface near a striped cloth.

The scene transitions to a white surface with a striped kitchen towel visible in the top left corner. Large, white capital letters spelling "MICROWAVE" appear centered on the screen. This text overlay indicates the next step for melting the chocolate chips and butter mixture shown in the previous shot.

A white bowl now holds a smooth, glossy dark brown liquid. A silver fork stirs the melted mixture, creating swirls on the surface. The texture is uniform and viscous, showing the chocolate and butter have been heated and combined into a ganache-like consistency.

A silver fork vigorously stirs a smooth, glossy dark brown liquid inside a white bowl. The melted chocolate mixture swirls continuously as the utensil moves through it, maintaining a consistent, viscous texture with no visible lumps remaining in the blend. The motion creates circular ripples on the surface.

The silver fork continues to vigorously stir the smooth, glossy dark brown liquid mixture inside the white bowl. The melted chocolate swirls around, maintaining a consistent, viscous texture with circular ripples forming on the surface as the utensil moves through the blend.

A thin stream of dark chocolate pours onto the textured, square oat bars arranged on a wooden board. The liquid chocolate creates zig-zag lines across the golden-brown surface, adding a glossy topping to the treats. In the background, a white bowl containing crushed candy pieces sits on a striped cloth.

A hand sprinkles small, orange-brown crushed candy pieces onto the square oat bars arranged on a wooden board. The bars feature a dark chocolate drizzle topping. A white bowl filled with more crushed candy sits on a striped cloth in the background near the treats.

The hand withdraws after sprinkling crushed orange-brown candy pieces over the chocolate-drizzled oat bars. The final treat sits in sharp focus on the wooden board, displaying a generous layer of dark chocolate zig-zags and scattered candy crumbs atop the textured, golden-brown cereal base.

The scene holds on a static close-up of the finished square cereal treats arranged on a wooden board. The golden-brown bars display dark chocolate drizzles and scattered crushed candy pieces. A white bowl containing more toppings sits blurred in the background near a striped cloth.

A hand enters the frame from the top right, reaching toward the front cereal bar. Fingers extend and grasp the square treat, covered in chocolate drizzle and candy crumbs. The hand begins to lift the bar from the wooden board, interacting with the previously static arrangement of finished desserts.

A hand enters from the top right, fingers grasping the front square cereal treat topped with chocolate drizzle and crushed candy. The hand lifts the textured bar slightly off the wooden board, separating it from the adjacent treats while the background remains static with a white bowl visible.

A hand holds a square cereal treat topped with chocolate drizzle and crushed candy crumbs aloft. The treat is elevated above the wooden board, displaying its textured side and glossy toppings while other bars remain arranged in the background near a white bowl containing more crumbs.

The square cereal treat rests on the wooden board with a bite taken out of the front corner, revealing the sticky interior texture. Dark chocolate drizzles and crushed candy pieces cover the top surface. Other treats remain arranged in the background near a white bowl containing more toppings.
